task_completion.description: Verify the 'Customer' profile type has been renamed to 'Business Customer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Profile Types list page (/admin/config/people/profile-types) or the profile type edit page showing the label 'Business Customer' instead of 'Customer'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Address' field is configured to make the 'Organization' component required.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Address field settings page. Under the 'Field overrides' or component settings section, the 'Organization' row should have 'Required' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify a new field labeled 'Contact Phone' has been added to the profile type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Manage fields' page for the Business Customer profile type. There should be a row with the label 'Contact Phone'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Contact Phone' field has the correct machine name and field type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Manage fields' page, verify the 'Contact Phone' row shows the machine name 'field_contact_phone' and the field type 'Text (plain)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Contact Phone' field is marked as required.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the field settings/edit page for the 'Contact Phone' field. The 'Required field' checkbox must be checked.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Drupal admin interface in a web browser, not terminal commands (like drush) or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Drupal application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the authentic Drupal Commerce administrative interface, not a text editor modifying configuration YAML files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show database management tools like phpMyAdmin or a MySQL command line interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The profile type label must be exactly 'Business Customer'. The Address field override for 'Organization' must be set to 'required'. The new field must have the machine name 'field_contact_phone', its type must be 'Text (plain)' (which maps to 'string' in Drupal storage), and it must have the 'Required field' setting enabled.
